asset.title: Proposals Wall Review
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview effectively demonstrates the transition from a spreadsheet view to a diligence wall review within the NodeRoom platform, highlighting agent collaboration and trace logs.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly shows the transition to the Diligence Wall and the review of agent proposals.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the before-and-after states of the workspace as the user switches views.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode layout, though the high density of text panels slightly clutters the screen.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the core product pillars: files, spreadsheets, walls, and traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing realistic financial diligence data and agent interactions.

legibility.evidence: Small font sizes in the chat and trace panels are somewhat difficult to read without zooming.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts and auditors managing variance reconciliation.

productionHonesty.evidence: The UI state changes and trace logs accurately reflect the system's operations.

observedEvidence: Diligence wall canvas with sticky notes
Room trace panel updating with agent proposals
Public and private agent chat panels

defects.observed: Abrupt transition between the spreadsheet view and the diligence wall view.
defects.fix: Add a brief transition animation or a hover state to make the view switch smoother.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Reviewing automated financial proposals and sticky notes on the Diligence Wall.
